title: SmurfcatMod
description: We live We love We LIE
body:
The best mod you need for FABRIC 1.18.2

Requires GeckoLib and FabricAPI

Created with <3 by

TheMativious y Vowxky: Developers
Chochi: 3D Art

In this mod, you will be able to live adventures together with your Smurf cat, from the meme we all know and love,
craft tools and fight against evil
